cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is about when Richard could have gone to the basketball court. The basketball court was closed after 8pm, so we know the latest he could have gone is before 8pm. Let's see what else we know. First, Richard woke up at 5am. So before 5am, he was asleep, right? So he couldn't go to the basketball court before 5am because he wasn't awake yet. Then, Elizabeth saw Richard taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 5am to 7am. Wait, so between 5am and 7am, he was in Pisa taking photos. So he couldn't have been at the basketball court during that time either. That would eliminate option B, which is 5am to 7am. Then Lisa saw Richard at the electronic store fixing their computer from 3pm
